notes:
Warlock II comes with native Linux support out-of-the-box. Game runs without a problem, except the graphical details are way more basic then on Windows. 

It seems the generic AMD gpu driver shrinks down the options for graphical details, so it is more a driver issue then a game related one. My LinuxMint 19.1 does actually not support installation of amdgpu-pro.
title: Warlock 2: The Exiled

notes: The Linux native version is unfinished, slow, and bugged, while with Proton + D9VK it runs like a charm.
title: Warlock 2: The Exiled
